description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and typecheck. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest with Python 3.9, checking out the repository with submodules, setting up Python, creating a virtual environment, installing dependencies with poetry, running tests, reporting coverage to Codecov, and packaging with pyinstaller. The typecheck job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9, performing similar steps but only for type checking.
